title: Agent Contract
description: FR-VID-12 §4 Stage 5 — Machine-readable typed agent declaration. Each contract declares the agent's objective, data dependencies, allowed tools, delegation policy, stop condition, failure routing, and memory writes.

agent_type.description: Agent type key matching allowed_agent_types in DEP-RUN-001 profiles.

objective.description: Human-readable description of the agent's purpose and scope.

reads.description: DEP schema IDs or runtime artifacts this agent reads as input.

writes.description: DEP schema IDs or memory domains this agent may write to. Format: DEP-ID or DEP-RUN-006:object_type.

tool_policy_id.description: Reference to DEP-RUN-004 tool policy governing this agent's allowed tools.

allowed_subagents.description: Agent types this agent may delegate work to.

team_ids.description: DEP-RUN-008 team config IDs this agent may dispatch.

chain_ids.description: DEP-RUN-009 chain config IDs this agent may invoke.

stop_condition.description: Declarative condition under which the agent considers its work complete.

failure_routing.description: Map of failure type to routing target (e.g. invalid_patch → route_to_commander).

memory_writes.description: Canonical memory object types this agent writes on command-end.
